title: tephrosia lathyroides
intro: Tephrosia lathyroides, also known as horsefly bush or wild pea, is a perennial shrub native to South Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a purgative and in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia lathyroides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia lathyroides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
